metadata.description: English labels for all ESRS data points, standards, and disclosure requirements

ESRS-1.name: General Requirements
ESRS-1.description: Overarching requirements for sustainability reporting under ESRS, including materiality assessment, value chain considerations, and reporting principles.

ESRS-2.name: General Disclosures
ESRS-2.description: General disclosures applicable to all undertakings regardless of sector, including governance, strategy, impact/risk/opportunity management, and metrics/targets.

E1.name: Climate Change
E1.description: Climate change mitigation and adaptation, including GHG emissions (Scopes 1, 2, 3), energy consumption and mix, GHG intensity, removal projects, and transition plans.

E2.name: Pollution
E2.description: Pollution of air, water and soil, including emissions of pollutants, substances of concern, and microplastics.

E3.name: Water and Marine Resources
E3.description: Water consumption, withdrawal, discharge, recycling and impacts on marine resources.

E4.name: Biodiversity and Ecosystems
E4.description: Impacts on biodiversity and ecosystems, land-use change, species at risk, and ecosystem services.

E5.name: Resource Use and Circular Economy
E5.description: Resource inflows, outflows, waste generation, recycling, and circular economy strategies.

S1.name: Own Workforce
S1.description: Working conditions, equal treatment and opportunities, and other work-related rights for the undertaking's own workforce.

S2.name: Workers in the Value Chain
S2.description: Working conditions, equal treatment, and rights of workers in the upstream and downstream value chain.

S3.name: Affected Communities
S3.description: Impacts on communities in the areas where the undertaking operates or has significant activities.

S4.name: Consumers and End-Users
S4.description: Impacts on consumers and end-users related to product safety, data privacy, and other consumer rights.

G1.name: Business Conduct
G1.description: Business ethics, corporate culture, anti-corruption, political engagement, and management of relationships with suppliers.

disclosure_requirements.ESRS2-GOV-1: Governance: Role of administrative, management and supervisory bodies
disclosure_requirements.ESRS2-GOV-2: Governance: Information provided to and sustainability matters addressed by administrative, management and supervisory bodies
disclosure_requirements.ESRS2-GOV-3: Governance: Integration of sustainability-related performance in incentive schemes
disclosure_requirements.ESRS2-GOV-5: Governance: Risk management and internal controls over sustainability reporting
disclosure_requirements.ESRS2-SBM-1: Strategy: Market position, strategy, business model and value chain
disclosure_requirements.ESRS2-SBM-2: Strategy: Interests and views of stakeholders
disclosure_requirements.ESRS2-SBM-3: Strategy: Material impacts, risks and opportunities and their interaction with strategy and business model
disclosure_requirements.ESRS2-IRO-1: Impact, risk and opportunity management: Description of processes to identify and assess material impacts, risks and opportunities
disclosure_requirements.ESRS2-IRO-2: Impact, risk and opportunity management: Disclosure requirements in ESRS covered by the sustainability statement
disclosure_requirements.ESRS2-BP-1: Basis for preparation: General basis for preparation of sustainability statement
disclosure_requirements.ESRS2-BP-2: Basis for preparation: Disclosures in relation to specific circumstances
disclosure_requirements.E1-1: Transition plan for climate change mitigation
disclosure_requirements.E1-2: Policies related to climate change mitigation and adaptation
disclosure_requirements.E1-3: Actions and resources in relation to climate change policies
disclosure_requirements.E1-4: Targets related to climate change mitigation and adaptation
disclosure_requirements.E1-6: Gross Scopes 1, 2, 3 and Total GHG emissions
disclosure_requirements.E1-7: GHG removals and GHG mitigation projects financed through carbon credits
disclosure_requirements.E1-9: Anticipated financial effects from material physical and transition risks and potential climate-related opportunities
disclosure_requirements.E2-2: Actions and resources related to pollution
disclosure_requirements.E2-4: Pollution of air, water and soil
disclosure_requirements.E2-5: Substances of concern and substances of very high concern
disclosure_requirements.E2-6: Anticipated financial effects from pollution-related impacts, risks and opportunities
disclosure_requirements.E3-1: Policies related to water and marine resources
disclosure_requirements.E3-2: Actions and resources related to water and marine resources
disclosure_requirements.E3-3: Targets related to water and marine resources
disclosure_requirements.E3-5: Anticipated financial effects from water and marine resources-related impacts, risks and opportunities
disclosure_requirements.E4-1: Transition plan on biodiversity and ecosystems
disclosure_requirements.E4-2: Policies related to biodiversity and ecosystems
disclosure_requirements.E4-3: Actions and resources related to biodiversity and ecosystems
disclosure_requirements.E4-4: Targets related to biodiversity and ecosystems
disclosure_requirements.E4-5: Impact metrics related to biodiversity and ecosystems change
disclosure_requirements.E4-6: Anticipated financial effects from biodiversity and ecosystem-related impacts, risks and opportunities
disclosure_requirements.E5-1: Policies related to resource use and circular economy
disclosure_requirements.E5-2: Actions and resources related to resource use and circular economy
disclosure_requirements.E5-3: Targets related to resource use and circular economy
disclosure_requirements.E5-6: Anticipated financial effects from resource use and circular economy-related impacts, risks and opportunities
disclosure_requirements.S1-2: Processes for engaging with own workforce and workers' representatives about impacts
disclosure_requirements.S1-3: Processes to remediate negative impacts and channels for own workforce to raise concerns
disclosure_requirements.S1-4: Taking action on material impacts on own workforce, and approaches to managing material risks and pursuing material opportunities related to own workforce, and effectiveness of those actions
disclosure_requirements.S1-5: Targets related to managing material negative impacts, advancing positive impacts, and managing material risks and opportunities
disclosure_requirements.S1-7: Characteristics of non-employee workers in the undertaking's own workforce
disclosure_requirements.S1-8: Collective bargaining coverage and social dialogue
disclosure_requirements.S1-16: Remuneration metrics (pay gap and total remuneration)
disclosure_requirements.S1-17: Incidents, complaints and severe human rights impacts
disclosure_requirements.S2-1: Policies related to value chain workers
disclosure_requirements.S2-2: Processes for engaging with value chain workers about impacts
disclosure_requirements.S2-3: Processes to remediate negative impacts and channels for value chain workers to raise concerns
disclosure_requirements.S2-4: Taking action on material impacts on value chain workers, and approaches to managing material risks and pursuing material opportunities, and effectiveness of those actions
disclosure_requirements.S2-5: Targets related to managing material negative impacts, advancing positive impacts, and managing material risks and opportunities
disclosure_requirements.S3-2: Processes for engaging with affected communities about impacts
disclosure_requirements.S3-3: Processes to remediate negative impacts and channels for affected communities to raise concerns
disclosure_requirements.S3-4: Taking action on material impacts on affected communities, and approaches to managing material risks and pursuing material opportunities, and effectiveness of those actions
disclosure_requirements.S3-5: Targets related to managing material negative impacts, advancing positive impacts, and managing material risks and opportunities
disclosure_requirements.S4-1: Policies related to consumers and end-users
disclosure_requirements.S4-2: Processes for engaging with consumers and end-users about impacts
disclosure_requirements.S4-3: Processes to remediate negative impacts and channels for consumers and end-users to raise concerns
disclosure_requirements.S4-4: Taking action on material impacts on consumers and end-users, and approaches to managing material risks and pursuing material opportunities, and effectiveness of those actions
disclosure_requirements.S4-5: Targets related to managing material negative impacts, advancing positive impacts, and managing material risks and opportunities
disclosure_requirements.G1-1: Business conduct policies and corporate culture
disclosure_requirements.G1-3: Prevention and detection of corruption and bribery
disclosure_requirements.G1-4: Confirmed incidents of corruption or bribery

ESRS2-GOV-1-1.label: Composition of administrative, management and supervisory bodies
ESRS2-GOV-1-1.description: Description of the composition and diversity of the administrative, management and supervisory bodies including their roles in sustainability oversight.

ESRS2-GOV-1-2.label: Sustainability expertise of governing bodies
ESRS2-GOV-1-2.description: Description of the sustainability-related expertise available to or accessible by the administrative, management and supervisory bodies.

ESRS2-GOV-1-3.label: Sustainability responsibilities of governing bodies
ESRS2-GOV-1-3.description: Description of how the administrative, management and supervisory bodies interact with their roles and responsibilities regarding sustainability matters.

ESRS2-GOV-1-4.label: Frequency of sustainability discussions by governing bodies
ESRS2-GOV-1-4.description: How often the administrative, management and supervisory bodies are informed about and discuss sustainability-related topics.

ESRS2-GOV-2-1.label: Information provided to governing bodies on sustainability
ESRS2-GOV-2-1.description: Description of the information that the administrative, management and supervisory bodies consider with respect to sustainability matters.

ESRS2-GOV-2-2.label: Sustainability matters addressed by governing bodies
ESRS2-GOV-2-2.description: List and description of the sustainability matters addressed by the administrative, management and supervisory bodies during the reporting period.

ESRS2-GOV-3-1.label: Sustainability performance in incentive schemes
ESRS2-GOV-3-1.description: Description of how sustainability-related performance is integrated into the incentive schemes for members of the administrative, management and supervisory bodies.

ESRS2-GOV-3-2.label: Percentage of variable remuneration linked to sustainability
ESRS2-GOV-3-2.description: The proportion of variable remuneration dependent on sustainability-related targets or performance.

ESRS2-GOV-4-1.label: Statement on sustainability due diligence
ESRS2-GOV-4-1.description: Mapping of the undertaking's due diligence process as set out in the UN Guiding Principles on Business and Human Rights and OECD Guidelines.

ESRS2-GOV-5-1.label: Risk management processes for sustainability reporting
ESRS2-GOV-5-1.description: Description of the risk management and internal control processes over sustainability reporting.

ESRS2-SBM-1-1.label: Description of business model and value chain
ESRS2-SBM-1-1.description: Description of the undertaking's business model and value chain, including significant changes during the reporting period.

ESRS2-SBM-1-2.label: Markets and customer segments
ESRS2-SBM-1-2.description: Description of the markets and customer segments the undertaking operates in.

ESRS2-SBM-1-3.label: Significant value chain elements
ESRS2-SBM-1-3.description: Description of significant elements in the undertaking's value chain relevant to sustainability matters.

ESRS2-SBM-1-4.label: Revenue by significant ESRS sector
ESRS2-SBM-1-4.description: Breakdown of revenue by significant ESRS sector.

ESRS2-SBM-1-5.label: Number of employees by country
ESRS2-SBM-1-5.description: Number of employees in the undertaking broken down by country.

ESRS2-SBM-2-1.label: Stakeholder engagement processes
ESRS2-SBM-2-1.description: Description of the process for engaging with stakeholders and their interests and views.

ESRS2-SBM-2-2.label: Key stakeholder groups identified
ESRS2-SBM-2-2.description: Identification of the undertaking's key stakeholder groups and their relationships.

ESRS2-SBM-3-1.label: Material impacts, risks and opportunities
ESRS2-SBM-3-1.description: Description of the material impacts, risks and opportunities identified through the materiality assessment process.

ESRS2-SBM-3-2.label: Financial effects of sustainability risks and opportunities
ESRS2-SBM-3-2.description: Current and anticipated financial effects of sustainability-related risks and opportunities on the undertaking's financial position, performance and cash flows.

ESRS2-IRO-1-1.label: Process for identifying material sustainability matters
ESRS2-IRO-1-1.description: Description of the process to identify and assess material sustainability impacts, risks and opportunities.

ESRS2-IRO-1-2.label: Stakeholder engagement in materiality assessment
ESRS2-IRO-1-2.description: Description of how stakeholders are involved in the materiality assessment process.

ESRS2-IRO-2-1.label: List of ESRS covered in the sustainability statement
ESRS2-IRO-2-1.description: List of the disclosure requirements in ESRS that are covered by the undertaking's sustainability statement.

ESRS2-BP-1-1.label: Basis for preparation of sustainability statement
ESRS2-BP-1-1.description: General basis for the preparation of the sustainability statement, including reporting boundary and consolidation scope.

ESRS2-BP-1-2.label: Reporting boundary and consolidation scope
ESRS2-BP-1-2.description: Description of the reporting boundary and consolidation scope used in the sustainability statement.

ESRS2-BP-2-1.label: Disclosures for specific circumstances
ESRS2-BP-2-1.description: Additional disclosures required for specific circumstances such as time horizons, value chain estimation, or sources of estimation uncertainty.

ESRS2-MDR-P-1.label: Description of sustainability-related policies
ESRS2-MDR-P-1.description: Description of the policies the undertaking has in place to manage material sustainability matters.

ESRS2-MDR-A-1.label: Description of sustainability-related actions
ESRS2-MDR-A-1.description: Description of the actions and action plans, including resources allocated, to address material sustainability matters.

ESRS2-MDR-M-1.label: Metrics used to assess sustainability performance
ESRS2-MDR-M-1.description: Description of the metrics used by the undertaking to evaluate performance on material sustainability matters.

ESRS2-MDR-T-1.label: Sustainability-related targets
ESRS2-MDR-T-1.description: Description of the measurable, outcome-oriented, time-bound targets set by the undertaking for material sustainability matters.

E1-1.label: Gross Scope 1 GHG emissions
E1-1.description: Total gross Scope 1 GHG emissions in metric tonnes of CO2 equivalent, covering all direct emissions from owned or controlled sources including stationary combustion, mobile combustion, process emissions, and fugitive emissions.

E1-2.label: Gross Scope 2 GHG emissions (location-based)
E1-2.description: Total gross location-based Scope 2 GHG emissions in metric tonnes of CO2 equivalent from purchased electricity, heat, steam, and cooling using grid-average emission factors.

E1-2A.label: Gross Scope 2 GHG emissions (market-based)
E1-2A.description: Total gross market-based Scope 2 GHG emissions in metric tonnes of CO2 equivalent, reflecting contractual instruments such as renewable energy certificates and power purchase agreements.

E1-3.label: Gross Scope 3 GHG emissions
E1-3.description: Total gross Scope 3 GHG emissions in metric tonnes of CO2 equivalent across all 15 upstream and downstream categories.

E1-3-C1.label: Scope 3 Category 1 - Purchased goods and services
E1-3-C1.description: GHG emissions from the production of goods and services purchased by the undertaking in the reporting period.

E1-3-C2.label: Scope 3 Category 2 - Capital goods
E1-3-C2.description: GHG emissions from the production of capital goods purchased or acquired by the undertaking in the reporting period.

E1-3-C3.label: Scope 3 Category 3 - Fuel-and-energy-related activities
E1-3-C3.description: GHG emissions from fuel-and-energy-related activities not included in Scope 1 or Scope 2, including upstream emissions of purchased fuels and T&D losses.

E1-3-C4.label: Scope 3 Category 4 - Upstream transportation and distribution
E1-3-C4.description: GHG emissions from transportation and distribution of purchased products in vehicles not owned or controlled by the undertaking.

E1-3-C5.label: Scope 3 Category 5 - Waste generated in operations
E1-3-C5.description: GHG emissions from third-party disposal and treatment of waste generated in the undertaking's operations.

E1-3-C6.label: Scope 3 Category 6 - Business travel
E1-3-C6.description: GHG emissions from transportation of employees for business-related activities in vehicles not owned or controlled by the undertaking.

E1-3-C7.label: Scope 3 Category 7 - Employee commuting
E1-3-C7.description: GHG emissions from transportation of employees between their homes and worksites.

E1-3-C8.label: Scope 3 Category 8 - Upstream leased assets
E1-3-C8.description: GHG emissions from operation of assets leased by the undertaking not already included in Scope 1 and 2.

E1-3-C9.label: Scope 3 Category 9 - Downstream transportation and distribution
E1-3-C9.description: GHG emissions from transportation and distribution of sold products in vehicles not owned or controlled by the undertaking.

E1-3-C10.label: Scope 3 Category 10 - Processing of sold products
E1-3-C10.description: GHG emissions from processing of intermediate products sold by the undertaking by third parties after sale.

E1-3-C11.label: Scope 3 Category 11 - Use of sold products
E1-3-C11.description: GHG emissions from the use of goods and services sold by the undertaking in the reporting period.

E1-3-C12.label: Scope 3 Category 12 - End-of-life treatment of sold products
E1-3-C12.description: GHG emissions from waste disposal and treatment of products sold by the undertaking at the end of their life.

E1-3-C13.label: Scope 3 Category 13 - Downstream leased assets
E1-3-C13.description: GHG emissions from operation of assets owned by the undertaking and leased to other entities.

E1-3-C14.label: Scope 3 Category 14 - Franchises
E1-3-C14.description: GHG emissions from operation of franchises not included in Scope 1 and 2.

E1-3-C15.label: Scope 3 Category 15 - Investments
E1-3-C15.description: GHG emissions associated with the undertaking's investments in the reporting period not already included in Scope 1 and 2.

E1-4.label: Total GHG emissions
E1-4.description: Total GHG emissions across Scope 1, Scope 2 (location-based), and Scope 3 in metric tonnes of CO2 equivalent.

E1-5.label: Total energy consumption
E1-5.description: Total energy consumption from all sources, both renewable and non-renewable, in megawatt-hours.

E1-5A.label: Total energy consumption from non-renewable sources
E1-5A.description: Energy consumption from fossil fuels and other non-renewable sources.

E1-5B.label: Non-renewable energy consumption breakdown by source
E1-5B.description: Breakdown of non-renewable energy consumption by fuel type (coal, oil, natural gas, other).

E1-6.label: Renewable energy consumption
E1-6.description: Total energy consumption from renewable sources including solar, wind, hydro, geothermal, and biomass.

E1-6A.label: Renewable energy consumption breakdown by source
E1-6A.description: Breakdown of renewable energy consumption by source type (solar, wind, hydro, geothermal, biomass).

E1-7.label: Renewable energy percentage
E1-7.description: Percentage of total energy consumption from renewable sources.

E1-8.label: GHG intensity per revenue
E1-8.description: GHG emissions intensity expressed as metric tonnes of CO2 equivalent per million EUR revenue.

E1-8A.label: GHG intensity per net revenue
E1-8A.description: GHG emissions intensity expressed as metric tonnes of CO2 equivalent per million EUR net revenue.

E1-9.label: GHG removals and carbon credits
E1-9.description: GHG removals and carbon credits from mitigation projects financed through carbon credits.

E1-9A.label: GHG removals from own operations
E1-9A.description: GHG removals and storage from the undertaking's own operations and upstream/downstream value chain.

E1-9B.label: Carbon credits purchased
E1-9B.description: Amount of carbon credits purchased and cancelled during the reporting period.

E1-10.label: Internal carbon price
E1-10.description: Description of the internal carbon pricing mechanisms applied by the undertaking.

E1-11.label: Transition plan for climate change mitigation
E1-11.description: Description of the undertaking's transition plan for climate change mitigation aligned with limiting global warming to 1.5 degrees Celsius.

E1-12.label: Locked-in GHG emissions from existing assets
E1-12.description: Estimated amount of locked-in GHG emissions from existing or planned key assets and products.

E1-13.label: CapEx and OpEx related to taxonomy-aligned activities
E1-13.description: Amount of CapEx and OpEx related to EU Taxonomy-aligned economic activities in the reporting period.

E1-14.label: Anticipated financial effects from physical climate risks
E1-14.description: Estimated financial effects of material physical climate risks on the undertaking's operations and financial position.

E1-15.label: Anticipated financial effects from transition risks
E1-15.description: Estimated financial effects of material climate transition risks on the undertaking's strategy and business model.

E1-16.label: Anticipated financial effects from climate-related opportunities
E1-16.description: Estimated financial effects of material climate-related opportunities on the undertaking.

E1-17.label: Scope 1 GHG emissions by country
E1-17.description: Breakdown of gross Scope 1 GHG emissions by country of operation.

E1-18.label: Scope 1 GHG emissions by operating segment
E1-18.description: Breakdown of gross Scope 1 GHG emissions by significant operating segment or economic activity.

E1-19.label: Scope 1 GHG emissions by GHG type
E1-19.description: Breakdown of gross Scope 1 GHG emissions by greenhouse gas type (CO2, CH4, N2O, HFCs, PFCs, SF6, NF3).

E1-20.label: GHG emissions reduction targets
E1-20.description: Description of GHG emission reduction targets including baseline year, target year, percentage reduction, and scope coverage.

E1-21.label: Progress against GHG reduction targets
E1-21.description: Progress towards achieving GHG emission reduction targets expressed as percentage achieved.

E1-22.label: Science-based target status
E1-22.description: Whether the undertaking has set science-based targets validated by the SBTi or equivalent body.

E1-23.label: Energy efficiency improvement target
E1-23.description: Energy efficiency improvement target as percentage reduction from baseline year.

E1-24.label: Renewable energy target
E1-24.description: Target for share of renewable energy in total energy consumption.

E1-25.label: GHG emissions from biogenic sources
E1-25.description: CO2 emissions from biogenic sources (e.g., combustion of biomass), reported separately from the scopes.

E2-1.label: Emissions of air pollutants
E2-1.description: Total emissions to air of: NOx, SOx, particulate matter (PM2.5, PM10), and other significant air pollutants in metric tonnes.

E2-1A.label: NOx emissions
E2-1A.description: Total nitrogen oxides (NOx) emissions to air.

E2-1B.label: SOx emissions
E2-1B.description: Total sulphur oxides (SOx) emissions to air.

E2-1C.label: Particulate matter emissions (PM2.5)
E2-1C.description: Total fine particulate matter (PM2.5) emissions to air.

E2-1D.label: Particulate matter emissions (PM10)
E2-1D.description: Total coarse particulate matter (PM10) emissions to air.

E2-2.label: Emissions of ozone-depleting substances
E2-2.description: Total emissions of ozone-depleting substances (ODS) in kg CFC-11 equivalent.

E2-3.label: Emissions to water
E2-3.description: Total discharge of priority substances, heavy metals, and nutrients to water bodies.

E2-3A.label: Heavy metals discharge to water
E2-3A.description: Total discharge of heavy metals (mercury, lead, cadmium, etc.) to water bodies.

E2-3B.label: Nutrient discharge to water
E2-3B.description: Total discharge of nutrients (nitrogen, phosphorus) to water bodies.

E2-4.label: Emissions to soil
E2-4.description: Total discharge of pollutants to soil including hazardous substances.

E2-5.label: Substances of concern produced or used
E2-5.description: Total production and use of substances of concern (SoC) and substances of very high concern (SVHC) as defined by REACH.

E2-5A.label: Substances of very high concern (SVHC)
E2-5A.description: Total amount of substances of very high concern as defined by ECHA REACH Regulation.

E2-6.label: Microplastics generated
E2-6.description: Amount of microplastics generated or released by the undertaking's operations.

E2-7.label: Pollution-related fines and penalties
E2-7.description: Total monetary value of fines and penalties for pollution-related non-compliance.

E2-8.label: Anticipated financial effects from pollution risks
E2-8.description: Estimated financial effects of material pollution-related risks and opportunities.

E3-1.label: Total water consumption
E3-1.description: Total water consumption across all operations in cubic metres.

E3-2.label: Water consumption in water-stressed areas
E3-2.description: Water consumption in areas classified as high or extremely high water stress according to WRI Aqueduct.

E3-2A.label: Percentage of water consumption in water-stressed areas
E3-2A.description: Percentage of total water consumption that occurs in water-stressed areas.

E3-3.label: Water withdrawals
E3-3.description: Total water withdrawals by source (surface water, groundwater, seawater, produced water, third-party water).

E3-3A.label: Water withdrawal from surface water
E3-3A.description: Total water withdrawn from surface water sources (rivers, lakes, reservoirs).

E3-3B.label: Water withdrawal from groundwater
E3-3B.description: Total water withdrawn from groundwater sources (wells, aquifers).

E3-3C.label: Water withdrawal from third-party sources
E3-3C.description: Total water withdrawn from third-party municipal or industrial sources.

E3-4.label: Water discharge
E3-4.description: Total water discharge to surface water, groundwater, seawater, and third parties.

E3-4A.label: Water discharge by quality
E3-4A.description: Water discharge broken down by quality level (treated, untreated).

E3-5.label: Water recycling and reuse
E3-5.description: Total water recycled and reused across all operations.

E3-5A.label: Water recycling rate
E3-5A.description: Percentage of total water consumption that is recycled or reused.

E3-6.label: Water storage change
E3-6.description: Net change in water storage during the reporting period.

E3-7.label: Water-related targets
E3-7.description: Description of water consumption reduction and efficiency targets.

E3-8.label: Anticipated financial effects from water risks
E3-8.description: Estimated financial effects of material water and marine resource-related risks and opportunities.

E4-1.label: Sites in or near biodiversity-sensitive areas
E4-1.description: Number and location of operational sites owned, leased, managed in, or adjacent to protected areas and areas of high biodiversity value.

E4-1A.label: Total area of sites in biodiversity-sensitive areas
E4-1A.description: Total area in hectares of operational sites in or near biodiversity-sensitive areas.

E4-2.label: Land-use change
E4-2.description: Total area of land-use change including deforestation, conversion, and restoration.

E4-2A.label: Deforestation-free status
E4-2A.description: Whether the undertaking's operations and supply chain are deforestation-free (yes/no and description).

E4-2B.label: Land degradation
E4-2B.description: Total area of land degraded during the reporting period.

E4-2C.label: Land restored or rehabilitated
E4-2C.description: Total area of land restored or rehabilitated during the reporting period.

E4-3.label: Species at risk affected
E4-3.description: Number of IUCN Red List species and national conservation list species with habitats in areas affected by operations.

E4-3A.label: Critically endangered species affected
E4-3A.description: Number of IUCN Critically Endangered species affected by operations.

E4-3B.label: Endangered species affected
E4-3B.description: Number of IUCN Endangered species affected by operations.

E4-3C.label: Vulnerable species affected
E4-3C.description: Number of IUCN Vulnerable species affected by operations.

E4-4.label: Ecosystem services dependencies
E4-4.description: Description of the undertaking's dependencies on ecosystem services.

E4-5.label: Biodiversity offsets
E4-5.description: Area and type of biodiversity offsets implemented during the reporting period.

E4-6.label: Biodiversity-related targets
E4-6.description: Description of targets related to biodiversity and ecosystems, including no-net-loss or net-positive targets.

E4-7.label: Anticipated financial effects from biodiversity risks
E4-7.description: Estimated financial effects of material biodiversity and ecosystem-related risks and opportunities.

E5-1.label: Total waste generated
E5-1.description: Total weight of waste generated across all operations in metric tonnes.

E5-1A.label: Waste generated by type
E5-1A.description: Breakdown of total waste generated by waste classification type.

E5-2.label: Hazardous waste
E5-2.description: Total weight of hazardous waste generated as classified by applicable regulations.

E5-2A.label: Hazardous waste by disposal method
E5-2A.description: Breakdown of hazardous waste by disposal method (landfill, incineration, recycling, other).

E5-3.label: Non-hazardous waste
E5-3.description: Total weight of non-hazardous waste generated.

E5-3A.label: Non-hazardous waste by disposal method
E5-3A.description: Breakdown of non-hazardous waste by disposal method (landfill, incineration, recycling, composting, other).

E5-4.label: Waste diverted from disposal
E5-4.description: Total weight of waste diverted from disposal through recycling, reuse, or other recovery operations.

E5-4A.label: Waste diverted from disposal by recovery operation
E5-4A.description: Breakdown of waste diverted from disposal by type of recovery operation.

E5-5.label: Waste recycling rate
E5-5.description: Percentage of total waste that is recycled.

E5-6.label: Material inflows
E5-6.description: Total weight of materials used in production and packaging, including virgin and recycled content.

E5-6A.label: Recycled content in material inflows
E5-6A.description: Percentage of material inflows from recycled sources.

E5-6B.label: Renewable material inflows
E5-6B.description: Percentage of material inflows from renewable biological sources.

E5-7.label: Products designed for circularity
E5-7.description: Percentage or number of products designed for durability, reuse, repair, remanufacturing, or recycling.

E5-8.label: Material outflows
E5-8.description: Total weight of materials leaving the undertaking including products and packaging.

E5-9.label: Waste reduction targets
E5-9.description: Description of waste reduction and circular economy targets.

E5-10.label: Anticipated financial effects from resource use risks
E5-10.description: Estimated financial effects of material resource use and circular economy-related risks and opportunities.

S1-1.label: Total number of employees
S1-1.description: Total headcount of employees at the end of the reporting period.

S1-1A.label: Total number of employees (FTE)
S1-1A.description: Total number of employees expressed as full-time equivalents.

S1-2.label: Employees by gender
S1-2.description: Breakdown of total employees by gender (female, male, other/not disclosed).

S1-2A.label: Female employees percentage
S1-2A.description: Percentage of total employees who are female.

S1-2B.label: Female employees in management
S1-2B.description: Percentage of management positions held by female employees.

S1-3.label: Employees by region
S1-3.description: Breakdown of total employees by region or country of operation.

S1-4.label: Employees by contract type
S1-4.description: Breakdown of employees by contract type (permanent, temporary, full-time, part-time).

S1-4A.label: Permanent employees
S1-4A.description: Total number of employees on permanent contracts.

S1-4B.label: Temporary employees
S1-4B.description: Total number of employees on temporary contracts.

S1-5.label: Employee turnover rate
S1-5.description: Employee voluntary and involuntary turnover rate as a percentage of total workforce.

S1-5A.label: Voluntary turnover rate
S1-5A.description: Rate of employees who left voluntarily during the reporting period.

S1-5B.label: New hires during reporting period
S1-5B.description: Total number of new employees hired during the reporting period.

S1-6.label: Gender pay gap
S1-6.description: Difference between the average gross hourly pay of male and female employees, expressed as a percentage of male gross hourly pay.

S1-6A.label: Gender pay gap by employee category
S1-6A.description: Gender pay gap broken down by employee category (management, professional, operational).

S1-7.label: Training hours per employee
S1-7.description: Average number of training and skills development hours per employee during the reporting period.

S1-7A.label: Training hours by gender
S1-7A.description: Average training hours per employee broken down by gender.

S1-7B.label: Training hours by employee category
S1-7B.description: Average training hours per employee broken down by employee category.

S1-7C.label: Training investment per employee
S1-7C.description: Average investment in training per employee during the reporting period.

S1-8.label: Work-related injuries
S1-8.description: Total number of recordable work-related injuries during the reporting period.

S1-8A.label: High-consequence work-related injuries
S1-8A.description: Number of high-consequence work-related injuries (excluding fatalities).

S1-9.label: Work-related fatalities
S1-9.description: Total number of work-related fatalities during the reporting period.

S1-10.label: Lost time injury frequency rate (LTIFR)
S1-10.description: Number of lost time injuries per million hours worked.

S1-10A.label: Total recordable incident rate (TRIR)
S1-10A.description: Number of total recordable incidents per million hours worked.

S1-11.label: Work-related ill health
S1-11.description: Number of cases of recordable work-related ill health during the reporting period.

S1-12.label: Days lost to work-related injuries and ill health
S1-12.description: Total number of working days lost due to work-related injuries and ill health.

S1-13.label: Collective bargaining coverage
S1-13.description: Percentage of employees covered by collective bargaining agreements.

S1-14.label: Social dialogue coverage
S1-14.description: Percentage of employees covered by workers' representatives or social dialogue forums.

S1-15.label: Adequate wages assessment
S1-15.description: Whether the undertaking's employees are paid adequate wages benchmarked against applicable standards.

S1-15A.label: Lowest wage as percentage of minimum wage
S1-15A.description: The lowest entry-level wage expressed as a percentage of the applicable legal minimum wage.

S1-16.label: Social protection coverage
S1-16.description: Percentage of employees covered by social protection against loss of income from major life events.

S1-17.label: Employees with disabilities
S1-17.description: Number or percentage of employees with disabilities.

S1-18.label: Age diversity of employees
S1-18.description: Breakdown of employees by age group (under 30, 30-50, over 50).

S1-19.label: Work-life balance: parental leave
S1-19.description: Number of employees that took parental leave, by gender, and return-to-work rate.

S1-19A.label: Parental leave return-to-work rate
S1-19A.description: Percentage of employees who returned to work after parental leave.

S1-20.label: CEO-to-median-worker pay ratio
S1-20.description: Ratio of the annual total compensation of the highest-paid individual to the median annual total compensation of all employees.

S1-21.label: Incidents of discrimination
S1-21.description: Number of incidents of discrimination reported during the reporting period and actions taken.

S1-22.label: Complaints filed through grievance mechanisms
S1-22.description: Number of complaints filed through formal grievance mechanisms and their resolution status.

S1-23.label: Severe human rights impacts on own workforce
S1-23.description: Number and description of severe human rights incidents, impacts and abuses connected with the undertaking's own workforce.

S2-1.label: Workers in value chain at risk of child labor
S2-1.description: Number or percentage of operations and suppliers identified as having significant risk of incidents of child labor.

S2-1A.label: Child labor risk assessment coverage
S2-1A.description: Percentage of suppliers assessed for child labor risk.

S2-2.label: Workers in value chain at risk of forced labor
S2-2.description: Number or percentage of operations and suppliers identified as having significant risk of incidents of forced or compulsory labor.

S2-2A.label: Forced labor risk assessment coverage
S2-2A.description: Percentage of suppliers assessed for forced labor risk.

S2-3.label: Value chain workers covered by social audits
S2-3.description: Number or percentage of value chain workers whose working conditions have been assessed through social audits.

S2-4.label: Value chain worker grievance mechanisms
S2-4.description: Number of grievances filed by value chain workers and their resolution status.

S2-5.label: Living wage assessment in value chain
S2-5.description: Whether value chain workers are paid a living wage, and the methodology for assessment.

S3-1.label: Communities affected by operations
S3-1.description: Number and description of communities affected by the undertaking's operations, including indigenous peoples and local communities.

S3-1A.label: Free, prior and informed consent processes
S3-1A.description: Whether and how free, prior and informed consent (FPIC) processes are implemented for affected indigenous peoples.

S3-2.label: Indigenous peoples affected
S3-2.description: Number of operations or activities that affect indigenous peoples and the nature of impacts.

S3-2A.label: Land rights disputes
S3-2A.description: Number of disputes related to land use and land rights with local communities.

S3-3.label: Community investment and contributions
S3-3.description: Total monetary value of community investments and voluntary contributions.

S3-4.label: Community grievance mechanisms
S3-4.description: Number of community-related grievances filed and their resolution status.

S3-5.label: Negative impacts on communities
S3-5.description: Description of actual and potential negative impacts on affected communities and actions taken.

S4-1.label: Product safety incidents
S4-1.description: Total number of incidents of non-compliance with product and service health and safety regulations.

S4-1A.label: Product safety incidents resulting in injury
S4-1A.description: Number of product safety incidents resulting in injury or illness to consumers.

S4-2.label: Product recalls
S4-2.description: Total number and volume of products recalled during the reporting period.

S4-2A.label: Percentage of products assessed for safety
S4-2A.description: Percentage of significant product and service categories for which health and safety impacts are assessed.

S4-3.label: Data privacy complaints
S4-3.description: Total number of substantiated complaints concerning breaches of customer privacy received from outside parties and regulatory bodies.

S4-3A.label: Data breaches involving personal data
S4-3A.description: Number of identified data breaches involving personal data of consumers or end-users.

S4-3B.label: Data privacy-related fines
S4-3B.description: Total monetary value of fines for data privacy or security violations.

S4-4.label: Responsible marketing practices
S4-4.description: Description of policies and incidents related to responsible marketing and advertising practices.

S4-5.label: Consumer satisfaction metrics
S4-5.description: Results of surveys or measures of consumer satisfaction.

S4-6.label: Access to products and services
S4-6.description: Description of how the undertaking ensures access to essential products and services for vulnerable groups.

G1-1.label: Convictions for corruption and bribery
G1-1.description: Number of confirmed incidents of corruption or bribery and related convictions during the reporting period.

G1-1A.label: Monetary losses from corruption
G1-1A.description: Total monetary losses resulting from corruption or bribery incidents, including fines and settlements.

G1-2.label: Anti-corruption training coverage
G1-2.description: Percentage of employees and governance body members who have received anti-corruption training.

G1-2A.label: Anti-corruption training by region
G1-2A.description: Anti-corruption training coverage broken down by region.

G1-3.label: Political contributions
G1-3.description: Total monetary value of financial and in-kind political contributions made during the reporting period.

G1-3A.label: Political contributions by country
G1-3A.description: Political contributions broken down by country and recipient.

G1-4.label: Fines for regulatory non-compliance
G1-4.description: Total monetary value of significant fines and number of non-monetary sanctions for non-compliance with laws and regulations.

G1-4A.label: Number of non-compliance incidents
G1-4A.description: Total number of significant instances of non-compliance with laws and regulations.

G1-5.label: Lobbying expenditures
G1-5.description: Total expenditures on lobbying activities during the reporting period.

G1-5A.label: Trade association memberships
G1-5A.description: List and total fees of trade association memberships where lobbying is a significant function.

G1-6.label: Whistleblower reports
G1-6.description: Number of reports received through whistleblower mechanisms and their resolution status.

G1-7.label: Anti-competitive behavior incidents
G1-7.description: Number of legal actions pending or completed regarding anti-competitive behavior and violations of anti-trust and monopoly legislation.

G1-8.label: Payment practices
G1-8.description: Description of the undertaking's payment practices, including average payment terms and on-time payment rate to suppliers.

G1-8A.label: Average payment terms to suppliers
G1-8A.description: Average number of days from invoice receipt to payment for suppliers.

G1-8B.label: On-time payment rate
G1-8B.description: Percentage of invoices paid within the agreed payment terms.

G1-9.label: Tax transparency
G1-9.description: Country-by-country reporting of income, taxes paid, and related economic indicators.

G1-10.label: Board diversity
G1-10.description: Composition of the highest governance body and its committees by gender, age group, minority or vulnerable group membership, and other indicators of diversity.

G1-10A.label: Independent board members
G1-10A.description: Percentage of independent members on the highest governance body.

G1-10B.label: Female board members
G1-10B.description: Percentage of female members on the highest governance body.
